productDisplayName: Jockey 24 x 7 Men Black Innerwear Vest 9922
description: Style Note This cotton racer back vest from jockey is a must have summer essential that can be worn for all your outdoor games or just when you are chilling out with friends. The soft fabric gives you a comfortable feel and the vibrant colours are simply fashionable. Pair this top with track pants and training shoes or shorts and casual shoes Product Details Balck racer back vest that has a round neck, contemporary styling with wider armholes that provides maximum comfort and freedom of movement. This top is designed to be worn as Sports wear, lounge wear, inner wear or casual wear and has a brand badge at the back Material and Care 100 % combed cotton with magic rib fabric Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron
